sections.paragraph:
verb להלול

to go mad; behave wildly, riotously, unruly

verb להלל (>>הילל)

to praise, glorify, laud, commend

verb הולל

be praised, glorified, lauded, commended

verb להתהלל

to praise oneself, boast

verb להלל

to praise, glorify, laud, commend

masculine noun

praise, laud, glorification, laudation, eulogy, glory, emblazonment, encomium, panegyric
